examples: One of his adherents complained of the stinginess of his wife.
In many parts South of the border, the elbow is linked to stinginess.
A man renowned for stinginess in his early years has become a great philanthropist.
Syracuse (30-9) has taken its trademark D to new levels of stinginess in the NCAA tournament.
Given America's general stinginess when it comes to foreign aid, their concern is understandable.
